negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: common_sense_56197f6f-abf5-4431-adb1-04b485608dd8
prompt: A Shiba Inu dog on a leash walks along a dirt path by a stunning turquoise lake nestled in a mountainous area. The backdrop features majestic mountains with patches of snow and lush greenery, creating a picturesque valley between them. The scene is bathed in bright sunlight, casting soft shadows on the ground. The two to three-meter-wide dirt path runs parallel to the lake on the right, leading towards one of the mountains. The lake's vibrant blue waters reflect the surrounding mountains and sky, with gray rocks lining its edge.  The dog, with its distinctive curled tail and light brown, reddish-brown, and white fur, trots along the path, its dark nose and leash clearly visible. As it walks, the camera captures the serene beauty of the landscape, including the scattered puddles and the distant figures of two people further down the path. The dog occasionally turns its head, its ears perked up, seemingly intrigued by something off-frame. The person holding the leash, clad in black gloves, a blue long-sleeved jacket, dark brown trousers, and dark brown lace-up boots, steps into view as the dog relaxes. The video begins with a slight Dutch tilt high-angle shot, transitioning to an arc shot as the dog turns and stops, its attention captured by an unseen object. The camera then shifts focus to the person holding the leash, who partially enters the frame, before the dog abruptly shakes its nose twice, causing the camera to make slight random movements.
